flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kapiolani Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Kapiolani Community College rose 54% between 2006 and 2009 (10.5% → 16.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Kapiolani Community College fell 15% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.8k → $9.2k).
